mapper.select: SELECT FILE_NO AS file_no , ORIGIN_NAME AS originName , SAVED_NAME AS savedName , FILE_PATH AS filePath , TARGET_TYPE AS targetType , TARGET_ID AS targetId FROM FILE_ATTACH WHERE TARGET_ID = #{no}
SELECT FILE_NO AS file_no , ORIGIN_NAME AS originName , SAVED_NAME AS savedName , FILE_PATH AS filePath , TARGET_TYPE AS targetType , TARGET_ID AS targetId FROM FILE_ATTACH WHERE FILE_NO = #{no}
